title: IDF soldier killed in southern Lebanon combat, 2 Hezbollah terrorists killed — nearly 100 targets struck in Saturday operations
snippet: One IDF soldier killed in combat in southern Lebanon on May 16. IDF also killed two Hezbollah terrorists near a rocket launch site. IDF struck nearly 100 Hezbollah targets across southern Lebanon in Saturday operations — weapons storage, observation posts, command sites. Cumulative death toll continues to rise.
tag_reason: 5/16 발생한 신규 전투 사상자. 5/15 다간 중사 전사와 별도의 새로운 전사자.
